name: Pre-pull Docker Images
description: Pull latest Docker images in the old (still running) container before upgrade. Images are cached on the persistent /var/lib/docker volume and reused by the new container.

parameters.name: Compose Project Name
parameters.description: Docker Compose project name (used to locate compose file in /opt/docker-compose/<project>/)

parameters.name: Target Versions
parameters.description: Comma-separated service=version pairs for version-specific upgrade

commands.description: Pre-pull Docker images in existing container for cache
